title: Relaunch of Net Zero Asset Managers Initiative
description:
NEW YORK — The Net Zero Asset Managers initiative (NZAM) announced today that it has relaunched the initiative, in a move that comes almost exactly one year after NZAM suspended activities in the wake of the departure of one of its biggest members, BlackRock. NZAM said its relaunch includes the support of more ... [continued]

The post Relaunch of Net Zero Asset Managers Initiative appeared first on CleanTechnica.
